# AetherHustle AI

> Personalized, AI-curated money-making strategies delivered daily. Discover, validate, build and scale ideas with AI-powered tools.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with features, pricing and testimonials.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or sign in.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): AI tools to discover opportunities, build a business plan and grow.
- [Preferences](/preferences): Customize niches, risk tolerance and experience level.
